name: au-token-regulatory
description: Bedrock regulatory documents for the au-token research project. Populate by either (a) dropping PDFs into this directory with the filenames below, or (b) running `python scripts/download_corpus.py corpora/au-token-regulatory/manifest.json` to fetch the verified URLs.

documents.title: Mineral and Petroleum Resources Development Act
documents.notes: MPRDA — active mining rights. Does not govern pre-2004 dumps (Ataqua).

documents.title: National Environmental Management: Waste Act
documents.notes: NEM:WA — waste classification and management. Operational gateway for retreatment.

documents.title: National Environmental Management Act
documents.notes: NEMA — duty of care (s28). Financial Provisioning Regs sit under NEMA.

documents.title: Waste Classification and Management Regulations
documents.notes: Parent regs for the waste-classification regime under NEM:WA.

documents.title: National Norms and Standards for the Assessment of Waste for Landfill Disposal
National Norms and Standards for Disposal of Waste to Landfill
documents.notes: 16-metal contaminant list. Gold not listed → simplifies output classification.

documents.title: Declaration of Crypto Assets as a Financial Product
documents.notes: Brings crypto assets under FAIS — CASP licensing implications.

documents.title: Financial Advisory and Intermediary Services Act
documents.notes: FAIS — financial product licensing under FSCA.

documents.title: Mineral and Petroleum Resources Royalty Act
documents.notes: MPRRA — royalty on transferred minerals. Open question: does it apply to pre-2004 dump output?

documents.title: Mineral Resources Development Bill 2025 (draft)
documents.notes: Largest legal-structural risk. Reintroduces State control over historic residue stockpiles.

documents.title: NEMA Financial Provisioning Regulations
documents.notes: Quantum for closure provisions on retreatment activities. (CER mirror — the dffe.gov.za cert chain fails on Windows; CER hosts the same gazette PDF.)

documents.title: De Beers Consolidated Mines Ltd v Ataqua Mining (Pty) Ltd and Others
documents.notes: Settled the pre-2004 dump common-law-property position. CER mirror (SAFLII blocks scrapers).

documents.title: Mpilo and Zen Holdings (Pty) Ltd v Centurion Mining Company (Pty) Ltd
documents.notes: Recent Mpumalanga HC ruling on tailings ownership; applies the Konstanz test.

documents.title: Revisiting an old gem in the circularity era: Reprocessing of tailings under the Ataqua judgment
documents.citation: Cliffe Dekker Hofmeyr, Mining & Minerals Alert, 12 November 2024
documents.notes: Practitioner synthesis of Ataqua + downstream developments. HTML.

documents.title: South African Code for the Reporting of Exploration Results, Mineral Resources and Mineral Reserves
documents.notes: Resource/reserve classification used in valuation algorithm (WP2).

documents.title: South African Code for the Reporting of Mineral Asset Valuation
